reference: When I masturbate, my penis becomes erect properly, but during sexual intercourse, it loses its hardness in a couple of minutes and then it just comes out. I recently started having sex but still managed to maintain hardness for a minute or two before it becomes softer and starts to come out. Please help.
text: When I masturbate, my penis becomes erect properly, but during sexual intercourse, it loses its hardness in a couple of minutes, and then it just comes out.
